findings.description: Merged cells in the 'Cape Fear – Neuse River Basin Hydrologic Model' column that spanned multiple rows in the PDF were split into separate rows with 'EMC Model Approval' duplicated across four rows (1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, 5/1/2013) instead of appearing as a single merged cell.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'EMC Model Approval' as one cell spanning approximately rows 1/1/2013 through 5/1/2013. HTML repeats the text in each individual row.

findings.description: The 11/14/2013 and 9/11/2014 rows had content spanning across multiple columns in the PDF (merged cells), but in the HTML the text is duplicated into separate columns rather than shown as a single merged cell.
findings.evidence: PDF: 11/14/2013 row shows 'Final Water Supply Plan and DWR's Allocation Recommendations presented at the EMC's November 2013 meeting.' spanning across Jordan Lake and Cape Fear columns. HTML: same text appears independently in both columns. Same pattern for 9/11/2014 row.

findings.description: The PDF table row for 11/14/2013 has the text 'Final Water Supply Plan and DWR's Allocation Recommendations presented at the EMC's November 2013 meeting.' in a single cell spanning the Jordan Lake and Cape Fear Water Supply Plan columns. The HTML duplicates this text into two separate cells (columns 2 and 3), misrepresenting the merged structure.
findings.evidence: PDF: merged cell spanning columns 2-3 at 11/14/2013. HTML: Final Water Supply Plan and DWR's Allocation Recommendations presented at the EMC's November 2013 meeting. appears in both column 2 and column 3.

findings.description: The PDF table row for 9/11/2014 has 'EMC decision at the September 2014 meeting.' in a single cell spanning columns 2-3. The HTML duplicates this into two separate cells.
findings.evidence: PDF: merged cell spanning columns 2-3 at 9/11/2014. HTML: EMC decision at the September 2014 meeting. appears in both column 2 and column 3.

findings.description: The HTML places 'EMC Model Approval' in four separate table rows (1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, 5/1/2013) in the Cape Fear–Neuse column. The PDF shows 'EMC Model Approval' as a single merged cell in that column spanning roughly those rows. Repeating it four times fabricates content in cells that were blank in the unmerged interpretation.
findings.evidence: HTML rows for 1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, and 5/1/2013 all contain EMC Model Approval. PDF shows a single merged cell with that text.

findings.description: The footnote URL 'http://www.doodle.com/5ctdbuc2n3akshim' appears as plain text in the HTML and is not wrapped in an <a href> tag.
